string.text:
The modified Lebel 1886 rifle, chambered in the modern 7.62x51mm NATO round, retains the iconic appearance and reliability of its predecessor while offering improved performance and compatibility with contemporary ammunition. Featuring a capacity of five rounds in a tubular magazine, the rifle retains its characteristic bolt-action mechanism and long barrel, ensuring accuracy and range. With its historic design blended seamlessly with modern firepower, this 7.62x51mm Lebel 1886 serves as a testament to the enduring legacy of a classic firearm adapted for the demands of the modern era. 
 
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] ZF-4 Scope
